Corrects previous flash flood report from 2 W Hartwick Pines State Park. Emergency Manager for Crawford County discussed many roads/intersections in the Fredric township area covered in water along with numerous flooded intersections. Many dirt roads in the town were washed out from heavy/intense rainfall starting as early as 9PM Wednesday into Thursday morning.
